Konuşmamın başında da söyledim, Türkiye siftahsızdır, çarşı pazar itimatsızdır. İhracatta rekor kırdık diye alkış beklerken ithalatın bu ülkeyi nasıl yuttuğunu, dış ticaret açığının nasıl bir kara deliğe dönüştüğünü konuşmuyorsunuz. Gerçekler acı; 2025'in ilk dokuz ayında
67 milyar dolar açık verdik, yıl sonu beklentisiyse 93 milyar dolar. Bu açık, milletin geleceğinden, evlatlarımızın rızkından gitmektedir. Türkiye, küresel markaların fason üretim atölyesine dönüştürüldüğü için bu açık verilmektedir. Yükte ağır, pahada hafif ne varsa Türkiye olarak biz satıyoruz. Teknolojiyi ve katma değeri yüksek ürünleri yabancıdan alırken doldurmakla övündüğünüz konteynerlerin içindeki malların değeri yerlerde sürünüyor. İşte bu kafa bizi orta gelir tuzağını aşamayan, ucuz işçilik cenneti hâline getirmiştir. Kapanan şirket sayısı yüzde 11 artmış, kurulan şirket sayısıysa azalmış. Ankara, büyüme masalları anlatadursun, Anadolu sessiz sedasız kepenk indiriyor. Koca koca şirketler teker teker iflas bayrağı çekiyor.
Ticaret Bakanlığı vatandaşı korumak mecburiyetindeyken vatandaşın can güvenliğini değil sadece etiket fiyatlarını görev edinmektedir. Bakanlık, vizyonunu zabıta mantığına hapsetmiştir. Binlerce personeli çarşı pazara salıp etiket avcılığıyla enflasyonu düşüremezsiniz. Üretimle düşer enflasyon, güvenle düşer. Vatandaş devletine inanırsa, devletinin parasına inanırsa enflasyon düşer. Marketteki etikete baktığınız kadar içindeki gıdaya da baksaydınız sadece son iki yılda 40 bin vatandaşımız gıda zehirlenmesiyle hastanelik olmazdı. Yurtlarda, okullarda,
kışlalarda, cezaevlerinde zehirlenme vakaları patlamıştır. Denetim yetersizdir, cezalar caydırıcı değildir. Vatandaş "Ucuz gıda bulayım." derken canından olurken Bakanlık havaya bakıp ıslık çalmaktadır. Milletin vicdanıyla oynayan maskeli ticarete, ülkeyi fasonculuğa mahkûm eden vizyonsuzluğa, vatandaşı zehirleyen denetimsizliğe "hayır" diyoruz.
Sözü hiç dolandırmadan, milletin vicdanını kanatan en büyük riyakârlığınıza, İsrail'le ticaret konusuna getirmek istiyorum mevzuyu. Hükûmet yetkilileri aylardır bu kürsülerden "İsrail'le ticareti kestik, tek bir çivi bile gitmiyor." diyor. Resmî verilere bakınca Mayıs 2024'ten sonra ticaret sıfır görünüyor. Uluslararası veriler ise başka bir şeyi söylüyor; BBC'nin Birleşmiş Milletler verilerine dayandırdığı rapora göre, 2024 yılında Gazze'deki soykırımın göbeğinde Türkiye, İsrail'in dünyada en çok mal aldığı 5'inci ülke olarak yer alıyor. İsrail kaynakları "Türkiye'den bize 2,8 milyar dolarlık mal geldi." diyor. Millete "İsrail'le ticareti kestik." masalı anlatıp, kâğıt üzerinde gemi rotalarını değiştirip, Filistin kılıfı adı altında ya da üçüncü ülkeler üzerinden İsrail limanlarına yanaşmaya devam edilmiştir. Halk Gazze için gözyaşı dökerken arka kapıdan maskeli ticaret yapmayı acaba
vicdanınıza nasıl izah edebiliyorsunuz?
Türkiye Yüzyılı vizyonunuzun en büyük fiyaskosu olan Sanayi ve Teknoloji Bakanlığının bütçesini artırarak sorunu çözeceğinizi zannediyorsunuz. Parayı betona, tabelaya ve yandaşa gömdüğünüz sürece hazinenin tamamını da verseniz bu sanayiyi ayağa kaldıramazsınız. Vizyon çarpıktır, rota yanlıştır, kaptanın tek derdi ise kendi makamıdır. Kürsülerde sanayi hamlesi masalları anlatılmaktadır ama rakamlar acı gerçeği yüzümüze çarpmaktadır. Sanayileştiğimiz iddia edilirken sanayinin millî gelirdeki payı her geçen gün düşüyor; üretimden kaçıp betona, ranta ve hizmet sektörüne sığınılıyor. Sanayisiz Türkiye, orta gelir tuzağı değil, düpedüz fukaralık tuzağıyla karşı karşıyadır. Sürekli bir savunma sanayisi vitrini, sürekli gelsin İHA'lar, gitsin SİHA'lar; elbette gurur duyarız ama saksıdaki çiçekle bahar gelmez, genel tabloya baktığımızda manzara korkunçtur.
İhracatımızdaki yüksek teknolojili ürün payı sadece yüzde 3,8'dir. OECD ülkelerinin ortalamasına göre küme düşme hattındayız. Rakamları doğru analiz etmeniz bakımından söylüyorum; düşük ve orta düşük teknolojili ürünleri yani yükte ağır, pahada hafif malları satıyoruz ama iş yüksek teknolojiye gelince el açıp dışarıdan alıyoruz. Yüksek teknolojili ürünlerde
30 milyar dolar ithalat yaparken sadece 8 milyar dolar ihracat yapabiliyoruz. Aradaki 22 milyar dolar teknolojik bağımlılığımızın bir belgesidir. Türkiye bir teknoloji üssü değil, montaj sanayisi ülkesi olmuştur. Hükûmet vidasını sıktığımız malın havasını atarken parasını başkası kazanıyor. Sözün özü: Hamallığı biz yaparken katma değeri elin oğlu yiyor. Bütçede AR-GE harcamalarında artış gözükmesine rağmen kaynaklar verimsiz kullanıldığı için yüksek teknoloji ihracatı artmıyor. Para, bilime, teknolojiye değil tabela üniversitelerine, yandaş projelere ve verimsiz beton işlerine aktarılıyor. İstediğiniz kadar "Teknopark yaptık." deyip övünün, içinde zekâ olmayan binalardan teknoloji çıkmaz. AR-GE yapacak mühendisi ülkede tutamıyoruz. Bu ülkenin en parlak zekâları liyakatsizlikten, vizyonsuzluktan, güvensizlikten kaçıp gidiyorlar. En büyük ihracat kalemimiz ise -üzülerek ifade ediyorum ki- yetişmiş insanımızdır. Sanayi yanıyor, kapasite kullanım oranı düşüyor; sanayici önünü göremiyor, şalter indiriyor, enerji maliyetleri ve finansmana erişim zorluğu içinde boğuluyor. Türkiye'nin küresel ligde fasoncu değil, oyun kurucu olmasını istiyoruz. Bu vizyonu taşıyamayan 2026 bütçesine milletimiz adına da işte bu sebeple "hayır" diyoruz.
Millî Eğitim Bakanlığına gelince; bütçeden en büyük paylardan birinin ayrıldığı söyleniyor, gelin görün ki okullarda sabun yok. Rakam yüksek ama hedefler de içerik de tam bir hayal kırıklığıdır. 2 trilyonluk bütçeden eğitim yatırımlarına ayrılan pay yüzde 2 bile değil. Mevcudu döndürmek, maaşları ödemek, günü kurtarmak bütçesinden bahsediyoruz. Geleceğe yani okula, teknolojiye, laboratuvara kaynak bile yok. Bu bütçe eğitimi şahlandırma bütçesi değildir, okulların kapısına kilit vurulmasın diye hazırlanan bir idareimaslahat bütçesidir.
Eğitime bu kadar para harcanmasına rağmen aileler çocuklarını gönül rahatlığıyla devlet okullarına gönderemiyorlar, dişlerinden tırnaklarından artırıp özel okullara göndermek mecburiyetinde kalıyorlar. Devlet okullarındaki nitelik düşüşü genel kabul hâline gelmiştir.
PISA verilerine göre, çocuklarımız okuduğunu anlamada, matematikte, fende dünyadaki akranlarıyla yarışamamaktadır. Sayın Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı bilgileri kimden aldı bilmiyorum ama eğitimdeki bu hazin durum hepimizin malumudur. Müfredat yazboz tahtasına döndürülmüştür, bilimsellikten eser kalmamıştır. Çocuklarımız yabancı dili okulda, sınıfta değil, Youtube'dan, yabancı dizilerden ve oyunlardan öğrenmeye çalışıyorlar. Devletin okulu bir yabancı dili bile öğretemiyorsa vay o bütçenin hâline!
Değerli milletvekilleri, Türkiye Yüzyılı'nda okullar, temizlik personeli çalıştıramayan, hijyenden yoksun binalara dönüşmüştür. Sorarsanız kayıt parası yasak, uygulamada ise "bağış" denilerek, "fotokopi" denilerek, "temizlik" denilerek veliler haraca bağlanıyor. Devletin okulunda tuvalet temizliği velinin cebine bakıyorsa sosyal devlet orada çökmüştür demektir. En ağır olanı ise bütçede yine bir öğün ücretsiz yemek bulunmamasıdır. Her 4 çocuktan 1'i okula aç gitmektedir, kantinlerde bir tost 60 liradır. Biz "Çocuklarımız derste açlıktan bayılmasın, bir tas çorba verin." diyoruz, bir tas çorba; siz ise "Kaynak yok, tasarruf tedbiri." diyorsunuz. İtibarınızdan tasarruf etmiyorsunuz ama 7 yaşındaki çocuğun kursağındaki lokmadan tasarruf etmeye kalkışıyorsunuz. Çocuklarını doyuramayan, onların tuvaletlerini temizleyemeyen bir sistemin bütçesi sadece tükeniş bütçesi değil aynı zamanda da vicdansızlık bütçesidir. (İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar)
Öğretmenlere verilen "Mülakatı kaldıracağız." sözü tutulmamıştır. KPSS sınavında derece yapan gençlerimizi listeleri hazırlanmış, göstermelik üç dakikalık mülakatlarda eliyorsunuz. Ücretli öğretmen saçmalığına ısrarla devam ediyorsunuz. Asgari ücretten az kazanan, sigortası yarım yatan, mevsimlik işçi gibi
çalıştırılan öğretmen ayıbı bu bütçeyle de devam ediyor. Öğretmeni mutsuz, öğrencisi aç, velisi borçlu bir eğitim sistemiyle bir yere varılamaz. Rakamlar büyüyor, bütçe şiştikçe şişiyor ama eğitimde kalite, nitelik ve fırsat eşitliği her geçen sene kayboluyor. Sadece maaş ödeyen ama eğitimi geliştiremeyen, içinde öğretmen olmayan, öğrenci olmayan, vicdan olmayan bu vizyonsuz bütçeye işte bu sebeple "hayır" diyoruz.
Sağlık Bakanlığı bütçesine bakınca başımız dönüyor, para oluk oluk akıyor ama vatandaş memnun değil; sağlık sistemi çökmüş, para yine betona gömülmüş. "Hastanelerdeki kuyrukları bitirdik." diye övünürken aslında kendinizi kandırıyorsunuz; kuyrukları bitirmediniz, şeklini değiştirip kuyrukları evlerin içine soktunuz. Yarattığınız şeyin adı dijital kuyruklardır. Vatandaş, telefon ve bilgisayar başında randevu nöbeti tutuyor, sabah sabah saat 10.00'da sisteme giriyor, 10.01'de "Randevular dolu." yazısını görüyor. Cildiyeye, göze, dişe randevu almanın ihtimali piyangodan ikramiye çıkması kadar düşük. Parasını milletin ödediği sağlık sisteminde vatandaş hizmet alamıyor. Bütçenin aslan payını, garantili projeler olan şehir hastaneleri alıyor. Parasını tıkır tıkır ödediğimiz o
dev binalar şu an sadece birer beton yığını olarak duruyor çünkü içinde doktor bulunamıyor. Koridorlarında kaybolduğunuz o ışıklı binalarda vatandaşı muayene edecek uzman kalmadı. Duvarları altından da yapsanız içinde şifa dağıtacak hekim yoksa o bina bir hiçtir. Müteahhidi zengin ettiniz ama hastayı doktorsuz bıraktınız.
İş hastanelerle de bitmiyor; eczaneler de yangın yerine döndü. Eczanelerde en basit ilaçlar bile yok çünkü ilaç fiyat kararnamesiyle piyasayı bozdunuz. İlaçta fiyatı baskılayarak "Tasarruf ettik." diyorsunuz ama aslında vatandaşın sağlığından tasarruf ediyorsunuz. İlaç fiyat kararnamesi bir fiyat kontrol mekanizması olmaktan çıkmıştır, bir ilaçsızlık politikasına dönüşmüştür. Firmalar ilaç getiremiyor, üretim de yapmıyorlar, vatandaş elinde reçete eczane eczane gezip ilaç dileniyor; paranla rezil olmak işte tam olarak budur. Bu milletin vergileriyle devasa bir bütçe yapılıyor ama sistem tıkandığı için, internetten randevu alınamadığı için, devlette doktor bulunamadığı için vatandaş özel hastanelere mahkûm ediliyor; parası olan müşteri gibi özel hastanelere gidiyor, parası olmayan acil servis köşelerinde sürünüyor. Bu yönüyle sosyal devleti bitirdiniz, sağlığı parası olanın satın alabileceği bir lükse çevirdiniz. Bu bütçe, bir günde
4 milyar lira harcayıp vatandaşı randevu kuyruğunda bekleten, devasa hastaneler yapıp içini doktorsuz bırakan, milleti ilaçsızlığa mahkûm eden bir tükeniş bütçesidir. Vatandaşı müşteri, hastaneyi ticarethane gibi gören bu anlayışa elbette ki "hayır" diyeceğiz.
2025 yılı Aile Yılı. Aile Bakanlığı ise Hükûmetin sosyal devlet diye övündüğü ama aslında sosyal çöküşü gizlemeye çalıştığı Bakanlıktır. "Şu kadar haneye elektrik yardımı yaptık. Bu kadar haneye kömür yardımı yaptık. Yardım bütçesini şöyle katladık, böyle katladık." deniliyor. Rakamlar havada uçuşuyor, alkış bekleniyor. Sosyal yardımın artması bir başarı değil, aslına bakarsanız bir utançtır. Bir ülkede yardıma muhtaç hane sayısı her yıl katlanarak artıyorsa bu, ülkedeki yoksulluğun derinleştiğinin resmidir. O övündüğünüz rakamlar, aslında uyguladığınız ekonomi politikalarının iflas ettiğinin ispatıdır. Devlet elbette ihtiyacı olan vatandaşına destek olmalıdır ancak siz bu milleti devletin vereceği bir torba kömüre, bir koli makarnaya muhtaç hâle getirdiniz. Vatandaşı yoksullaştırıp sonra da verdiğiniz yardımı lütuf gibi sunuyorsunuz. Bunun adı, sosyal devlet değil; bunun adı, yoksulluğu yönetme kurnazlığıdır. Yardıma muhtaç hane sayısını artıran değil insanını zenginleştiren,
kendi ayakları üzerinde durmasını sağlayan bir bütçe istiyoruz. Bu yardım şovunun arkasında derin yoksulluk var, akşamları yatağa aç giren çocuklar var, okula giden çocuğunun beslenme çantasına peynir ekmek koyamayan annelerin vebali var ve bu vebal sizin boynunuzdadır. "Aile kutsal." diyorsunuz ama aile yılında o ailelerin çocukları yetersiz beslenmekten bodurlukla ve gelişememekle karşı karşıya, zihinsel gelişimi de her geçen gün gerilemeye mahkûm hâle getirilmiş. Çocuklarını açlıktan koruyamayan, onları ne idiği belirsiz yurtlara ve sokakların insafına terk eden bir Bakanlık, bütçe artışıyla övünmek yerine utanmak mecburiyetindedir. Bakanlığın adında "aile" var ama o ailenin içinde kadınlar katlediliyor. 6284 sayılı Yasa'nın teminatı olan İstanbul Sözleşmesi'nden çıktınız; kadınları, şiddet failleriyle ve uygulamacıların keyfiyetiyle baş başa bıraktınız. Bu bütçede, şiddet gören kadınlar için yeterli sayıda sığınmaevi bile yok. Kadını ekonomik olarak güçlendirerek onu şiddet sarmalından kurtaracak gerçekçi projeler yok. Kadını birey olarak değil sadece kutsal ailenin mağdur üyesi olarak görmeye devam ettiğiniz sürece kadına karşı şiddet de kadın cinayetleri de bitmeyecektir.
Engelli, yaşlı vatandaşlarımıza verdiğiniz evde bakım aylıkları ise bir sosyal devlet trajedisidir. Enflasyon o parayı yuttu, eritti. Verilen destek bir engellinin bez parasına ve ilaç parasına yetmiyor. Engelli vatandaşı eve hapseden, sosyal hayata katmayan, sadece üç kuruş harçlık verip kenara çekilen bu anlayış, insanlık onuruna yakışmamaktadır. Bu bütçe, yoksulluktan oy devşirmeyi hedefleyen, vatandaşı muhtaç kul hâline getiren ve milletin fakirleşmesiyle övünen bir âcizlik bütçesidir. Yoksulluğun itirafı olan bu tükeniş bütçesine elbette ki "hayır" diyoruz.
Gençlik ve Spor Bakanlığının adında "gençlik" var ama bütçede ve sahada gençlik yok, yine sadece inşaat var. Duygularını yok sayıp gençliğin üzerine de beton döküyorsunuz. Müteahhitleri zengin ettiniz ama gençleri kaybettiniz. İçinde özgür düşüncenin, sanatın, bilimin olmadığı binalar, gençlere hapishane gibi geliyor. Ruhlarına dokunmayan, onları anlamayan bir betonarme zihniyet gençliğimizi çürütüyor. TÜİK verileri ortadadır; eğitimde ve istihdamda olmayan gençlerin oranı rekor seviyelerdedir. Milyonlarca genç evde oturmaktadır, ev gencidir. Sabah uyanıp gidecek bir okulu ve çalışacak
bir işi olmayan, anasından, babasından harçlık istemeye utanan, odasına kapanmış, hayata küsmüş bir nesil yarattınız. Bu bütçede bu gençleri odalarından çıkaracak, hayata katacak bir vizyon yoktur. Üniversiteli gençlerin yurt sorunu hâlâ çözülmemiştir, bu konuda boş yere övünüyorsunuz. 3 kişilik odaların 6 kişiye, 4 kişilik odaların 8 kişiye çıkarılması kapasite artışı değil yaşam alanı gasbıdır. Bu binalara yurt denmez, denemez; oralar gençlerin umutlarını çürüten toplama kamplarına dönüştürülmüştür. Asansörleri giyotine, yemekleri zehre dönüşmüş denetimsiz yurtlarda gençlerimiz yaşamaya mahkûm edilmişlerdir. Gençler artık KYK borcunu nasıl ödeyeceğini değil ülkeden nasıl kaçacağını düşünüyor. Üniversite diplomasının meslek belgesi olarak değil yurt dışı bileti olarak algılandığı bir ülkeyi yönettiğinizi zannediyorsunuz. Devlet üniversiteyi bitiren gencine diploma değil icra kâğıdı hediye ediyor. Mezun olan genci tebrik etmesi gereken devlet, vergi dairesi aracılığıyla ödeme emri gönderiyor. Boş olan banka hesabına haciz koyuyor. Gençler hayata sıfırdan değil eksiyle yani borçla başlıyor. İş bulamamış, cebinde yol parası olmayan gence "Borcunu öde yoksa haciz gelir." diyen bir devlet kendisini sosyal devlet olarak tarif edemez.
Daha vahimi de sokakların hâlidir. Uyuşturucu kullanımı ortaokul çağlarına inmiş durumdadır. Gençler, umutsuzluktan, boşluktan zehir tacirlerinin ağına düşmektedir. Yaptığınız statların arka sokaklarında gençler zehirlenmektedir. Gençlik merkezleri yetersizdir, somut bir rehabilitasyon politikanız yoktur. Gençleri uyuşturucudan uzak tutacak politikaları üretemeyen bir bakanlık Spor Toto geliriyle övünemez. Bu bütçe, gençleri borçlandıran, öğrencisini barındıramayan, mezununu işsiz bırakan, işsiz genci de evde unutan ve umudunu yurt dışında aratan bir hayal kırıklığı bütçesidir. Gençlere beton değil gelecek vadeden bir anlayışla bu bütçeye "hayır" diyoruz. Bir saatlik adaletin yetmiş yıllık ibadetten hayırlı olduğunu vaaz eden bir geleneğin izlerinin silindiğine şahit oluyoruz. Maalesef, hukuk devletinden yargının siyasallaştırıldığı bir devletsizlik düzenine geçilmiştir. Anayasa Mahkemesi kararlarına uyulmayan, yerel mahkemelerin Anayasa Mahkemesine kafa tuttuğu, Yargıtayın Anayasa Mahkemesi üyeleri hakkında suç duyurusunda bulunduğu, hukukun siyasetin sopası hâline getirildiği bir Türkiye yüzyılındayız. Bakanlığın bütçesinde gördüğümüz tablo da şudur: İcra dairelerinde dosya sayısı 32 milyon 700 bine ulaşmıştır, ülkenin neredeyse yarısı icralıktır. "Geç gelen adalet, adalet değildir."
ilkesi unutulmuş, bir davanın görülme süresi dokuz yüz on sekiz güne çıkmıştır. Devlet kurumlarına liyakat yerine sadakatin getirilmesiyle devlette âdeta bir kast sistemi inşa edilmiştir. Vatandaşın, hakkını arama umudu sönmüş, hukuk devletine olan inancı sarsılmıştır. Bu, adaletsiz Türkiye'dir. İşte biz adaletsiz Türkiye'nin Adalet Bakanlığı bütçesine elbette ki "hayır" diyeceğiz. (İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar)
Dağlara taşlara "beka ve güvenlik" yazılan Türkiye'de İçişleri Bakanlığının bütçesi rekor bir seviyeye ulaşmıştır. Rakamlara göre Bakanlık dünyanın en büyük holdinglerinden daha zengindir ancak pencereden dışarı yani sokağa bakarsanız tablo tam tersidir. Ortada asayişsiz, güvensiz, tekinsiz bir Türkiye vardır. Türkiye'nin sokakları, kafeleri, restoranları Vahşi Batı'ya dönmüştür. Bugün, bir vatandaş internete girip yemek siparişi verir gibi hiç kimseye hesap vermeden, sabıka kaydı sorulmadan kapısına kadar pompalı tüfek getirebiliyor. Merdiven altı atölyelerde üretilen, harçlık parasına satılan bu tüfekler ağırlıklı olarak kadın cinayetlerinde, yol kesme kavgalarında, sokak çatışmalarında kullanılıyor. Trafikte yol verme kavgası saniyeler içinde silahlı çatışmaya dönüşüyor. Yasa dışı silahlanmayla güya mücadele edilirken her gün masum bir vatandaş serseri bir kurşunla
hayattan koparılıyor. Bu bütçede kontrolsüz silahlanmayı durduracak bir irade yoktur.
Emniyet bütçesine devasa kaynaklar aktarılıyor ama polislerimiz imkânsızlıklarla boğuşuyor.
Uluslararası uyuşturucu baronları, kırmızı bültenle aranan çete liderleri ise İstanbul'un lüks rezidanslarında yakalanıyorlar. Bu baronlar ülkeye elini kolunu sallayarak nasıl giriyor, nasıl kolayca yerleşiyor, hatta nasıl makbul insan muamelesi görüyorlar? Tuz kokmuştur sayın milletvekilleri, tuz kokmuştur.
Suriye'ye son model araç göndermeyi biliyorsunuz ama polise verdiğiniz kumanyadan böcek çıkıyor. İntihar vakaları, mobbing iddiaları, 12/24 gibi insanlık dışı çalışma saatleri tam gaz devam ediyor. Yorgun, mutsuz ve geçim derdine düşmüş bir polisle toplumun huzur ve güvenliğini temin edemezsiniz. Gece gündüz demeden canı pahasına çalışan polisimiz, jandarmamız yoksulluk sınırının altında yaşam savaşı verirken bütçede onların hayat standartlarını yükseltmeye yönelik tek bir cümle bile kurmamışsınız.
Yaptığınızı ben söyleyeyim, canları pahasına mücadele ettikleri teröristleri barış güvercini ilan edip onların vicdanlarını yaralıyorsunuz. Eskişehir'in göbeğinde bir vatan evladı ortaya çıkıp -yaptığı doğrudur değildir tartışılır ama- bu gerçekleri yüzünüze vurunca rahatsız oluyorsunuz. O ses hakikattir, o ses
milletin vicdanının, onurunun sesidir; o ses, bu vatan için şehit olmuş kahramanların ateşinin düştüğü ocakların haykırışıdır. Onurumuza, onurumuz olan güvenlik kuvvetlerimize, polisimize, jandarmamıza, askerimize milletin evinden, Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisinden selam olsun. (İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar)
Sokaktaki şiddeti bitiremeyen, uyuşturucu baronlarının kökünü kazıyamayan, kartelleşen çeteleri ortadan kaldıramayan, teröristi makbul görüp polisimizin, jandarmamızın hakkını teslim etmeyen bu bütçeye vicdanen de aklen de ahlaken de "hayır" diyoruz.
Ezcümle, Adalet Bakanlığı hukuku adam seçerek uyguluyor ve adaleti sağlamıyorsa bu bütçeye ne gerek vardır? Profesöründen araştırma görevlisine yoksulluk sınırında ya da onun altında maaş veriyorsan, devlet okullarını fiilen ortadan kaldırıyor, özel okul sayısının katbekat artışına zemin hazırlıyorsan Millî Eğitim bütçesine ne gerek vardır? Gençler iş bulup evlenemiyorsa, evlenenler yoksulluktan çocuk yapmaya çekiniyorsa, aileler geçinemiyorsa Aile Bakanlığının bütçesine ne gerek vardır? Yirmi üç yılın sonunda 1+1 veya 2+1 kümesten bozma evler millete büyük iş gibi pazarlanıyor, üstüne başvuru için 5 bin lira alınıyor, buna rağmen 6 milyona yakın başvuru yapılıyorsa; insanlar
derelerini, ormanlarını korumak için nöbet tutmak zorunda kalıyor, orman yangınına uçaklar değil beton dökme makineleri yetişiyorsa, iklim mültecilerinin kapıya dayanması an meselesiyken, çölleşen topraklarımız varken ve insanlarımız topraksız bırakılıyorken Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığının bütçesine ne gerek vardır?
Mercimeği, nohudu, pirinci, bulguru ithal ediyorsa, kendi ürünü gümrük kapılarından geri dönüyorsa, ata tohumunu ıslah etmek yerine İsrail tohumunu çiftçiye layık görüyorsa, çocuklarına ucuz süt içiremiyor, anaç hayvanlarını kesime gönderiyorsa Tarım Bakanlığının bütçesine ne gerek vardır?
Barzani'yi Türkiye Cumhuriyeti sınırları içinde kendi ağır silahlı adamları koruyorsa, her şehirde bir çete türediyse, hatta çeteler internet üzerinden bayilik vermeye başladılarsa İçişleri Bakanlığının bütçesine ne gerek var? (İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar)
Kürsülerden "büyük Türkiye, güçlü Türkiye" hamaseti yapılırken sokaktaki gerçeklik yarattığınız bu enkazın adını çoktan koymuştur: Bu bütçe teklifi beceriksizliğin, kötü niyetin ve vasıfsızlığın manifestosudur. Politika yapıcıların aklına barınma krizine çözüm olabilecek zorunlu sosyal kota veya boş konut vergisi gelmediği için karşımızda evsiz; icraya düşen krediler rekor kırarken milletin sofrası boş kaldığı için ekmeksiz; mal ve can güvenliği kalmadığı için de güvensiz bir ülke vardır. Yeni Türkiye
ambalajını kaldırdığımızda altından çıkan; her hücresine kadar çürümüş, her değeri yok edilmiş, eşitsizliğin meşrulaştırıldığı ve zayıfın yere düşürüldüğü bir yoksunluklar Türkiyesidir.
Biz bu iktidara da bütçesine de "hayır" diyoruz; yarattığı ekmeksiz Türkiye için "hayır" diyoruz; yarattığı evsiz Türkiye için "hayır" diyoruz; yarattığı tedbirsiz, plansız, hesapsız Türkiye için "hayır" diyoruz; adaletsiz, tekinsiz, güvensiz, hukuksuz Türkiye için "hayır" diyoruz; itimatsız, umutsuz, siftahsız Türkiye yarattığı için "hayır" diyoruz; yarattığı itibarsız, pusulasız Türkiye için "hayır" diyoruz.
"Bölgedeki riskler..." "Kartlar yeniden dağılıyor." "Beka tehdidi..." diye bağırıp duruyorsunuz. "Bölgede riskler var." "Kartlar yeniden dağıtılıyor." "Emperyalistler şunu yapıyor, öbürleri bunu planlıyor." diyorsunuz, deyip de duruyorsunuz. Bunun için PKK'yla bile pazarlık masasına oturduğunuzu, ulus kimliğine ve üniter yapıya dayalı cumhuriyetten bile vazgeçmemiz gerektiğini gizli gizli kapalı kapılar ardında fısıldıyorsunuz. Beka söz konusu olduğu için de bunu sindirmemizi hiddetle arzu ediyorsunuz. Peki, yarın "Bu işte de yanlış yapmışız; aldatılmışız, kandırılmışız." derseniz U dönüşü mü yapacaksınız? "Milletim hakkını helal etsin." mi diyeceksiniz? Ki yavaş yavaş da başladınız zaten. Buğday
ithal eder gibi millî kimlik ve üniter yapı mı ithal edeceksiniz? Cumhuriyet Türkiyesini yeniden tesis etmek için başka maden ruhsatları mı vereceksiniz? Ben bu konuya çok böyle kapsamlı girmeyecektim ama Sayın Meclis Başkanı birleşimi açarken böyle kapsamlı bir değerlendirme yaptı hatta yazılacak yeni rapordan vesaireden bahsetti, Komisyonun çok iyi çalıştığını anlattı. Komisyonun yapmış olduğu toplantıların yarıya yakını zaten gizli toplantı. Diler ve umarım ki beklentinize karşılık verecek bir şey çıkarabilirsiniz ama siz yapmış olduğunuz ziyaretin tutanaklarını bile yazdırmaya muktedir olmayan bir Meclisin Başkanısınız. (İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar) O sebeple, aklımıza düştüğü gibi konuşmak yerine son derece dikkatli cümleler sarf etmek mecburiyetinde olduğumuz akıldan uzak tutulmamalıdır.
Biz, terörsüz Türkiye masalıyla Türkiye'ye kâbus yaşatmak istediğiniz için, teröristlerle iktidar pazarlığı yapacak kadar millî benliğinizden uzaklaşıp şuursuzlaştığınız için, namus ve şerefiniz üzerine ettiğiniz o yeminleri unutup 85 milyonun hakkına, hukukuna göz diktiğiniz için size de bütçenize de "hayır" diyoruz.
Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum. (İYİ Parti sıralarından ayakta alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
ON BEHALF OF GOOD PARTY GROUP DURSUN MUSAVAT DERVİŞOĞLU (İzmir) - Mr. President, Esteemed Chairman of our political parties, esteemed MPs, my dear citizens who watch us on their screens; To explain the views and opinions of İYİ Party regarding the 2026 Central Government Budget Law Proposal and the 2024 Central Government Final Account Law Proposal.
I have made a promise. I greet you all with my most sincere feelings.
At the beginning of my words, I wish God's mercy to our Special Operations Police brother Emre Albayrak, who was martyred as a result of an attack in the morning, and to all our martyrs.
The budget being discussed is also the political accounting of a year. For this reason, I would like to start my speech by discussing the fault lines affecting our world, region and country. We are witnessing dramatic changes in today's world. The temporary optimism that prevailed after the Cold War is a thing of the past. The concept of globalization is questioned with its effects and consequences. Many principles that have been accepted as universal norms have also been discredited. International law is easily ignored. Global trade is restricted by protection walls. In such an atmosphere, security concerns naturally rise. Even states that are considered to be farthest from conflict areas are increasing their military expenditures. Diplomatic rules and practices are ignored. Thus, all tensions easily escalate, and it becomes more difficult to prevent and limit hot conflicts. However, it would not be correct to read this entire picture as the end of globalization. It is necessary to talk about a dual order, even a dilemma, because while all this is happening, global trade is growing, energy, technology and mining are in particular.
New cooperation networks are being built, including: On the other hand, the negative effects of globalization continue. Terrorism, mass migration, digital manipulation and environmental and climate problems affect all geographies. It is clear that threats have become more asymmetrical and countries are again looking for solutions in the nation state to protect themselves against these threats. However, as a result of neoliberal destruction, what returns is mostly the instruments of oppression and coercion. In this contradictory and complicated period, we witness that foreign policy has been transformed into domestic policy. We see new forms of imperialism and irredentism in foreign policy, and despotism and autocracy in domestic politics. Similar situations exist at different levels, from the United States to China, from Russia to Türkiye, from Italy to Hungary. In short, while security risks feed security needs, excessive security supply further cripples democratic institutions and processes. In this context, the possibility of the world falling into a historical vicious circle again increases. Because as the demand for strong, stable and rational government increases, the likelihood of these governments using the power they have recklessly increases; Societies that are uncertain, uncanny and loaded with anxiety become much more open to manipulation. For security reasons
Balance and control mechanisms are eliminated by taking shelter behind them.

Therefore, such difficult times are a crossroads for countries. In this world where real political understanding has risen again, there is no room for sentimentality, ideological obsessions, dreamers, identitarianism, heroism, romantic enthusiasms, precious loneliness, and deep fantasies. What is expected from the government is to make the cost-benefit analysis correctly. The duty of the opposition and the mind and will of the nation as a whole is not to allow the personal and political calculations of the government to determine the decision-making processes. In this respect, this is Türkiye's real test. Until now, I regret to say that the government ruling Türkiye has repeatedly exploited the transformations in the international system and security needs. For the sake of the limits of my speech, I will confine myself to a single example. One of these is our exclusion from the F-35 project, which we paid for by purchasing the S-400 defense system, the box of which we could not even open after the crashed Russian plane. In those days, it was said that our only protector was the S-400 system, and the technology transfers to be made were explained. As a result, as of December 8, 2025, we do not have an advanced air defense system that we can use, nor a warplane that we have purchased or produced. Moreover, the minimum cost of exiting the F-35 project is
It is 15 billion dollars. Why did I remind you of these? If you are looking for a source, here is an example of a source that has evaporated.
Let me continue. Now, you are talking about the Israeli threat. We see that you are hitting Iran with F-35s from hundreds of kilometers away and pointing out Greece's evil ambitions in the Aegean and Mediterranean. He also trusts his F-35s. So, what are you doing? "At least give F-16 to the United States." You say, and for this, besides numerous capitulations, you undertake to purchase a passenger plane worth 30 billion dollars. In your media, you criticize England as "the devil under every rock", and then you make an 11 billion dollar deal to buy their warplanes, whose success is highly questionable.
I ask: Is all this to ensure the security of the nation or the security of the government? I'm just talking about the 50 billion dollars that have been put on taxpayers' shoulders and gone up in smoke. If you could have done otherwise, today in this budget discussion, we would have talked about the deliveries of our domestic weapon systems, which we all boast about as being "under development", to our Armed Forces, and we would have talked about the benefits of exporting them to friendly and brotherly countries. What we are left with today is wasted money and ten years of time that will never come back.
The resulting risks and fragility are
communication work cannot compensate. If there is a major conflict tomorrow, God forbid, "I'm sorry, we won't be able to fight until 2030." Are you going to say, are you going to ask for a break? Türkiye is not a country whose survival can be cast with dice. We want you to stop seeing this country as a field inherited from your distant relative.
In a world where security risks are so high, the Turkish Government never has the luxury of taking such irrational steps or making such exorbitant mistakes.

There is no logical explanation why those who present themselves as the guarantor of national security and survival when they stand before the nation and ask for votes spend it so recklessly.
Today, we are gathered to talk about the common wealth that belongs to all of us as citizens. What has been and should be for centuries is that whoever spends the money must be accountable to the real owner of the money; This is the reason for the existence of the Parliament. However, the President, who is responsible for the expenditure, did not honor the Parliament today, as usual, by sending his own deputy to the elected representatives of the nation to present the budget. If you respect the principle of state and nation instead of seeking reinforcement from the legitimacy market of the Middle East, you will not have to negotiate legitimacy elsewhere. But you make rhymes
Locality, the meaning of which you have forgotten, is such a thing, while nationality starts from the Parliament of the nation. For this reason, today I will speak here to discuss not only the figures of the economy, which the government sees as propaganda rather than a program, but also the realities that slap us in the face every day, and I will try to make my speech within the limits of the budget as much as possible.
The government constantly talks about survival, security and a growing Türkiye on the podiums; It is true, this growth is clearly visible from the relevant figures. However, it is certain that what is growing is not the sustenance and hope of the people of my country. What is being talked about is actually the wealth of so many people that if you add it up, it could fill a thousand rooms. The source of the wealth of those thousand households is the rights and efforts of 26 million households, that is, 85 million citizens. You present this extortion regime with the New Türkiye packaging. The name of this regime you have established is not "new" but "unequal Türkiye"; The one who pays the price of inequality is the depleted and consumed Turkey. For this reason, the name of your budget is "exhaustion budget" in our opinion.
None of the numbers with lots of zeros and colorful tables can hide your quarter-century-old inadequacy and the constant crisis that you have been deepening and managing for eight years. Because the truth lies in the silent and angry screams of Türkiye, which is being silenced through fear and oppression.
You can no longer hear those screams. The truth is the truth of unqualified tradesmen, precarious workers, and unstable markets. The truth, unfortunately and regretfully, is an abandoned Turkey.
In the budget proposal, the Government wants a huge spending authority of 19 trillion lira. As in the past eight years, there is no relationship between the person who spends the wealth and the one whose wealth is spent. The source of 13.8 trillion tax revenue is citizens, and the biggest black hole of the budget is the interest expense of 2.7 trillion lira. The ratio of interest expense to budget has almost doubled in ten years. In other words, from the very beginning, 1 seventh of the 2026 budget will be transferred to interest lobbies instead of investment and production. The result is a high budget deficit, high-cost borrowing, high inflation and a collapse in purchasing power.
When it comes to retirees, "There are no resources", when it comes to teachers, "budget burden", when it comes to minimum wage workers, "Inflation will increase." It is said; When it comes to the expenses of the palace, there is no savings and there is no resource problem.

This table before us is not a budget table, but a conscience scale with a missing knob.
Also, the issue of covert funds whose destination is unknown has been revived. How many fires will be prevented in 2026 with the money to be spent from this appropriation?
How many earthquake victims could have been bought a plane, how many earthquake victims could have been built, how many children could have been given lunch? The government called this a "state secret". When you put the budget allocated to the Presidency and the implicit appropriation projections one by one, a terrible picture emerges: The daily expenditure in 2026 is 60 million lira, that is, 2.5 million lira per hour and 41 thousand lira per minute. Accordingly, for every minute of the palace, one has to work a full day for a month with 2 minimum wages.
I start the ministry budgets from the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry, that is, Türkiye without bread. The government's only apparent goal in this area is to make the farmers pack up their bags and leave their fields. Article 21 of the Agricultural Law states: "Agricultural supports cannot be less than 1 percent of the national income." Although there is a statement, the rate predicted for 2026 is only 2 per thousand. The law says "1 percent", there is a food crisis, you give 2 per thousand. The amount of support you stole from farmers' pockets in 2026 alone is 604 billion Turkish liras. You don't even realize the damage you are causing with the amount of support you withhold. Production collapsed, farmers are in debt. Farmers' loan debt increased by 43 percent compared to last year and reached 1 trillion 130 billion liras. In the last 20 years, the farmer's income has increased by 1 lira and his debt has increased by 7 lira.
We lost 27 percent of our wheat cultivation areas.
While our population has increased by 26 percent since 2000, wheat production per capita has decreased by 22 percent. Citizens cannot eat meat; Producers send their breeder animals to slaughter due to costs. We are playing for the world championship in food inflation. While the average of OECD countries is 5 percent, it is 27 percent in Türkiye. Right above us in the world rankings is Haiti, which is considered a "failed state", and right below us is Ukraine, which has been at war for years.
And shamelessly "There is a drought." It is said. This is an intellectual drought, not a meteorological one; it is clearly a problem of inability to manage. Nothing is being done against the pests that infest the fields. So, on this subject, excuse me, you have developed a wonderful project, giving bicycles to children in exchange for collecting insects. I applaud this visionary of yours and I would like to express that I find it beyond extraordinary. (Applause from the İYİ Party benches)
Like Türkiye without food, Türkiye without water is also a result. State Hydraulic Works has turned into an institution without vision, focusing on contracting services instead of technological transformation that will reduce farmers' costs and prevent water loss by managing water.
We have seen what the forests have become by experiencing it together. Our forests are now divided into two; they will either be destroyed and become mining areas or
They will be opened for construction.
As for construction; While each of you was a mujahid, God willing, you became a contractor. However, citizens cannot find a roof over their heads in Türkiye, which has been governed by a construction site regime for a quarter of a century, where no concrete has been poured and no place has been opened for development. Our people are homeless. While the home ownership rate of households was 73 percent in 2002, it has fallen to 55 percent today.

The figures you have indicate that the number of houses has increased, but the profit scheme you have established aims not to build a home for the nation, but to provide stock for real estate barons. Housing has become a hobby for the rich in Türkiye. Those who own a home are not the homeless, but those who are buying their 2nd, 3rd or 5th homes.
"Earthquake is destiny, property belongs to Allah." You build earthquake houses by saying, and while doing so, you drive the people in the vineyard to the mountains, you seize the title deeds with daring audacity, and you give good news from the podiums as "the biggest social housing move in the history of the republic". The numbers tell a different story, they scream out the deep poverty and despair you have created. 5 million 314 thousand citizens applied for the 500 Thousand Social Housing Project, located half an hour's walk from the neighboring city. This is not a picture of success, but a certificate of bankruptcy; it is the reality of a homeless Türkiye that you have created with your policies.
constitutional right
You have turned the right to housing into a game of chance. You did the same thing in the My First Home Project, to which 8 million of our citizens applied in 2022, you said "The lands are ready." You said, but when the citizen applied, "There is no land allocated yet." got the answer. There is not a single house in sight, what you are doing is clearly stealing people's rights and playing with the dreams of poor people. While TOKİ's construction capacity is an average of 70 thousand houses per year, without any technical infrastructure, now it says "We will build 100 thousand houses every year in the next five years." you say. What you could not do in the past twenty-two years, which was relatively better economically, I ask, how will you do it today? You also have the promise of rental housing for low-income people, which is clearly a mockery of the nation's mind. While millions of people are suffering under exorbitant rents and are afraid of being left on the streets, 15 thousand of the 500 thousand houses to be built will be given for rent. Giving the good news of 15 thousand rental houses in a country where millions of tenants are crying is equivalent to going to a fire with a glass of water. As long as you deal with these crazy projects, be sure that fire will not go out.
While we live in a country in the earthquake zone, scientists shout every day, "What is the share allocated for earthquake-resistant cities in this budget?" The public also wonders. Under the name of "urban transformation", the poor
Instead of renovating risky houses, luxury residences are erected in high-rent areas. There are no resources for the transformation of the coffin houses waiting to be demolished, but you are still calling the ghost of Canal Istanbul. Your understanding of urbanism is based on destroying your contractors, not on keeping people alive, and you have reduced the right to housing to a lottery ticket. Those who open our children's parks and earthquake gathering areas to shopping malls, not for earthquake safety, but for the never-ending development profit, allocate public lands to villas and residences instead of social housing, and when it comes to citizens, they say, "What if they win in the draw?" We completely reject this mentality that mongers hope.
You give positive decisions to almost all of the EIA reports you receive. Poisonous facilities are being established in our agricultural lands, you sign without hesitation. The money allocated to the fight against climate change in this budget is funny. Even your conscience does not ache when you bring Europe's plastic garbage and dump it on the fertile lands of Adana.

While you are making a show of saying "zero waste", you are turning Türkiye into a global waste dump.
I said it at the beginning of my speech, Türkiye is weak, the market is unreliable. While you expect applause for breaking a record in exports, you do not talk about how imports swallowed this country and what a black hole the foreign trade deficit turned into. The truth is painful; In the first nine months of 2025
We had a deficit of 67 billion dollars, and the year-end expectation is 93 billion dollars. This deficit affects the future of the nation and the sustenance of our children. This deficit is created because Türkiye has been turned into a contract manufacturing workshop for global brands. As Türkiye, we sell everything that is heavy in cargo and light in price. When purchasing technology and high value-added products from foreigners, the value of the goods in the containers you boast of filling is decreasing. This mentality has turned us into a paradise of cheap labor that cannot overcome the middle income trap. The number of closed companies increased by 11 percent, while the number of established companies decreased. While Ankara tells tales of growth, Anatolia is silently closing its doors. Huge companies are flagging bankruptcy one by one.
While the Ministry of Commerce is obliged to protect the citizens, its duty is only the sticker prices, not the life safety of the citizens. The Ministry has confined its vision to the logic of the police. You cannot reduce inflation by releasing thousands of personnel to the market and hunting for labels. Inflation falls with production and falls with confidence. If citizens believe in their state and their state's money, inflation will decrease. If you had looked at the food inside as much as you look at the label in the market, 40 thousand of our citizens would not have been hospitalized with food poisoning in the last two years alone. In dormitories, schools,
Cases of poisoning have exploded in barracks and prisons. Supervision is inadequate, penalties are not deterrent. Citizen: "Let me find cheap food." Then, while he is losing his life, the Ministry is looking at the sky and whistling. We say "no" to the masked trade that plays with the conscience of the nation, the lack of vision that condemns the country to subcontracting, and the lack of control that poisons the citizens.
Without beating around the bush, I would like to bring up the issue of trade with Israel, your biggest hypocrisy that bleeds the nation's conscience. Government officials have been saying from these platforms for months, "We have cut off trade with Israel, not a single nail is leaving." he says. Looking at official data, trade appears to be zero after May 2024. International data says something else; According to the BBC report based on United Nations data, Türkiye, at the heart of the genocide in Gaza in 2024, is the 5th country from which Israel buys the most goods in the world. Israeli sources said, "Goods worth 2.8 billion dollars came to us from Türkiye." he says. "We cut off trade with Israel," he told the nation. By telling the tale, the ship changed its routes on paper and continued to approach Israeli ports under the guise of Palestine or via third countries. While people are shedding tears for Gaza, I wonder if they are doing business with masks through the back door?
How can you explain it to your conscience?
You think that you will solve the problem by increasing the budget of the Ministry of Industry and Technology, which is the biggest fiasco of your Türkiye Century vision.

As long as you bury the money in concrete, signs and supporters, you cannot revive this industry even if you give the entire treasury. The vision is distorted, the route is wrong, and the captain's only concern is his own position. Tales of industrial action are told on the podiums, but the numbers confront us with the bitter truth. While it is claimed that we are industrializing, the share of industry in national income is decreasing day by day; People are running away from production and taking refuge in concrete, rent and the service sector. Türkiye without industry faces not the middle-income trap, but the outright poverty trap. A permanent defense industry showcase, UAVs coming, UCAVs constantly coming; Of course, we are proud, but spring does not come with flowers in pots, when we look at the general picture, the view is terrible.
The share of high-tech products in our exports is only 3.8 percent. According to the average of OECD countries, we are on the relegation line. I say this so that you can analyze the numbers correctly; We sell low and medium low technology products, that is, goods that are heavy in weight and light in price, but when it comes to high technology, we open our hands and buy from abroad. In high technology products
While we import 30 billion dollars, we can only export 8 billion dollars. The $22 billion gap is a testament to our technological addiction. Türkiye has become an assembly industry country, not a technology base. While the government is showing off the goods we have screwed on, someone else is making money. Bottom line: While we do the porterage, the son of the hand eats the added value. Although there is an increase in R&D expenditures in the budget, high technology exports do not increase because resources are used inefficiently. Money is not transferred to science and technology, but to signboard universities, partisan projects and inefficient concrete works. "We built a Technopark" as much as you want. Be proud, technology cannot come from buildings without intelligence. We cannot keep engineers to do R&D in the country. The brightest minds of this country are running away due to lack of merit, lack of vision and insecurity. Our biggest export item - I regret to say - is our trained people. Industry is burning, capacity utilization rate is falling; Industrialists cannot see the future, turn off the switch, and are drowning in energy costs and difficulty accessing finance. We want Türkiye to be a playmaker in the global league, not a subcontractor. This is why, on behalf of our nation, we say "no" to the 2026 budget, which cannot carry this vision.
As for the Ministry of National Education; It is said that one of the largest shares of the budget is allocated, but lo and behold, there is no soap in schools. The number is high, but both the goals and the content are a complete disappointment. The share allocated to education investments from the 2 trillion budget is not even 2 percent. We are talking about the budget to return the assets, pay the salaries, and save the day. There are not even resources for the future, that is, for schools, technology, and laboratories. This budget is not a budget to boost education, it is an administrative and public health budget prepared to prevent the doors of schools from being locked.
Despite spending so much money on education, families cannot send their children to public schools with peace of mind, they are forced to spend their money and send them to private schools. The decline in quality in public schools has become generally accepted.

According to PISA data, our children cannot compete with their peers around the world in reading comprehension, mathematics and science. I do not know from whom Mr. Vice President received the information, but we all know this sad situation in education. The curriculum has been turned into a blackboard, there is no trace of science left. Our children try to learn a foreign language not at school or in the classroom, but from YouTube, foreign TV series and games. If the state school cannot even teach a foreign language, woe to that budget!
Dear MPs, in the Turkish Century, schools have turned into unhygienic buildings that cannot employ cleaning staff. If you ask, registration fee is prohibited, and in practice, parents are extorted by means of "donation", "photocopy" or "cleaning". If the cleaning of toilets in a public school helps the parents' pockets, it means that the social state has collapsed there. The most difficult thing is that there is not a free meal in the budget. 1 in every 4 children goes to school hungry, a toast costs 60 lira in canteens. We say, "Give our children a bowl of soup so they don't faint from hunger during class." We say, a bowl of soup; and you say, "No resources, saving measure." you say. You are not saving your reputation, but you are trying to save the morsel from the crop of a 7-year-old child. The budget of a system that cannot feed its children or clean their toilets is not only a budget of depletion but also a budget of unconscionability. (Applause from the İYİ Party benches)
"We will abolish the interview" given to teachers. His promise was not kept. You eliminate our young people who have achieved success in the KPSS exam in mock three-minute interviews with lists prepared. You persist with the nonsense of paid teachers. Such as those who earn less than the minimum wage, whose insurance is half-paid, or who are seasonal workers.
The shame of employing teachers continues with this budget. You can't get anywhere with an education system where teachers are unhappy, students are hungry, and parents are in debt. The numbers are growing, the budget is getting bigger and bigger, but the quality, qualifications and equality of opportunity in education are disappearing every year. This is why we say "no" to this visionless budget that only pays salaries but cannot improve education, which has no teachers, no students, and no conscience.
When we look at the budget of the Ministry of Health, our head spins; money is flowing in abundance, but the citizens are not satisfied; The health system has collapsed and the money has been buried in concrete again. "We ended the queues in hospitals." When you boast, you are actually deceiving yourself; You didn't finish the tails, you changed their shape and put the tails into the houses. What you've created is called digital queues. The citizen keeps an appointment watch in front of the phone and computer, logs into the system at 10:00 in the morning, and at 10:01 he says "Appointments are full." He sees the text. The probability of getting an appointment for a dermatologist, eye or dental clinic is as low as winning a lottery prize. Citizens cannot receive service in the health system paid for by the nation. The lion's share of the budget is taken by city hospitals, which are guaranteed projects. It's the one we paid a lot of money for.
Giant buildings currently stand as mere piles of concrete because there are no doctors inside. There are no experts left to examine citizens in those illuminated buildings where you get lost in the corridors.

Even if you build the walls of gold, that building is nothing if there is no doctor to heal it. You made the contractor rich but left the patient without a doctor.
It doesn't end with hospitals; Pharmacies also turned into fire scenes. There are no even the simplest medicines in pharmacies because you have distorted the market with the drug price decree. "We saved money" by suppressing the price of medicine. You say, but you are actually saving on the health of the citizens. The drug price decree has ceased to be a price control mechanism and has turned into a drug-free policy. Companies cannot bring medicines, they do not produce them, citizens go to pharmacies with prescriptions and beg for medicines; This is exactly what it means to be disgraced with your money. A huge budget is being made with the taxes of this nation, but since the system is blocked, an appointment cannot be made online, and there is no doctor in the state, citizens are sentenced to private hospitals; Those who have money go to private hospitals like a customer, and those who don't have money languish in the corners of the emergency room. In this respect, you have ended the social state and turned health into a luxury that can be purchased by those who have money. This budget in one day
It is a depleted budget that spends 4 billion lira, makes citizens wait in line for appointments, builds huge hospitals and leaves them without doctors, and condemns the nation to lack of medicine. Of course, we will say "no" to this approach that sees citizens as customers and hospitals as businesses.
2025 is the Year of the Family. The Ministry of Family is the Ministry that the Government boasts of as a social state, but is actually trying to hide the social collapse. "We provided electricity aid to so many households. We provided coal aid to so many households. We multiplied the aid budget this way and that way." It is said. Numbers are flying in the air, applause is expected. Increasing social assistance is not an achievement, in fact it is a shame. If the number of households in need of assistance in a country increases exponentially every year, this is a picture of deepening poverty in the country. The figures you boast about are actually proof that the economic policies you implement are bankrupt. Of course, the state should support its citizens in need, but you have made this nation dependent on a bag of coal or a box of pasta that the state will provide. You impoverish the citizens and then present the aid you provide as a blessing. This is not called a social state; This is called the cunningness of managing poverty. Not one that increases the number of households in need of assistance, but one that enriches its people,
We want a budget that allows it to stand on its own feet. There is deep poverty behind this charity show, there are children who go to bed hungry at night, there is the blame of mothers who cannot put cheese and bread in the lunchbox of their children going to school, and this blame is on your neck. "Family is sacred." You say, but during the family year, the children of those families face stunting and underdevelopment due to malnutrition, and their mental development is doomed to decline day by day. A Ministry that cannot protect its children from hunger and leaves them to the mercy of unknown dormitories and streets should be ashamed instead of boasting about the budget increase. The ministry has "family" in its name, but women are murdered within that family.

You have left the Istanbul Convention, which is the guarantee of Law No. 6284; You left women alone with the perpetrators of violence and the arbitrariness of the perpetrators. In this budget, there are not even enough shelters for women subjected to violence. There are no realistic projects that will save women from the spiral of violence by empowering them economically. As long as you continue to see women not as individuals but only as victimized members of the sacred family, violence against women and femicide will not end.
The home care pensions you provide to our disabled and elderly citizens are a social state tragedy. Inflation swallowed that money and melted it. The support given is not enough to pay for diapers and medicine for a disabled person. This mentality, which confines disabled citizens to their homes, does not include them in social life, and only gives them three cents of pocket money and leaves them aside, does not suit human dignity. This budget is a budget of impotence that aims to gain votes from poverty, turns citizens into needy servants, and boasts about the impoverishment of the nation. Of course, we say "no" to this exhaustion budget, which is a confession of poverty.
The Ministry of Youth and Sports has "youth" in its name, but there is no youth in the budget and in the field, again there is only construction. You ignore their feelings and pour concrete on the youth. You made the contractors rich, but you lost the young people. Buildings where there is no free thought, art or science feel like prisons to young people. A reinforced concrete mentality that does not touch their souls and does not understand them is rotting our youth. TÜİK data is clear; The rate of young people not in education or employment is at record levels. Millions of young people live at home and are young people at home. He wakes up in the morning and has a school to go to and a job to work on.
You have created a generation that does not have a job, is ashamed to ask for pocket money from their parents, is locked in their room, and is embittered by life. There is no vision in this budget that will take these young people out of their rooms and into life. The dormitory problem of university students is still not solved, you are bragging about it for nothing. Increasing 3-person rooms to 6 people and 4-person rooms to 8 people is not a capacity increase but a usurpation of living space. These buildings cannot be called dormitories; Those places have been turned into concentration camps that undermine the hopes of young people. Our young people have been condemned to live in uncontrolled dormitories whose elevators have turned into guillotines and whose food has turned into poison. Young people are now thinking about how to escape from the country, not how to pay their KYK debt. You think that you rule a country where a university degree is perceived as a ticket abroad, not as a professional document. The state gifts young people who graduate from university with a certificate of execution, not a diploma. The state, which should congratulate the graduating young person, sends a payment order through the tax office. He puts a lien on the empty bank account. Young people start life with minus, that is, debt, not from scratch. To the young man who could not find a job and did not have travel money in his pocket, "Pay your debt or there will be foreclosure." A state that says "cannot describe itself as a social state."
What's worse is the condition of the streets. Drug use has decreased to middle school ages. Young people fall into the trap of poison dealers out of despair and emptiness. Young people are being poisoned in the back streets of the stadiums you built. Youth centers are inadequate, you do not have a concrete rehabilitation policy.

A ministry that cannot produce policies that will keep young people away from drugs cannot boast of Spor Toto income. This budget is a budget of disappointment that leaves young people in debt, cannot accommodate its students, leaves graduates unemployed, forgets unemployed young people at home and makes them look for hope abroad. We say "no" to this budget with an understanding that promises young people a future, not concrete. We are witnessing the erasure of the traces of a tradition that preached that one hour of justice is better than seventy years of worship. Unfortunately, there has been a transition from the rule of law to a stateless system in which the judiciary is politicized. We are in a century in Türkiye where the decisions of the Constitutional Court are not complied with, local courts challenge the Constitutional Court, the Supreme Court files criminal complaints against the members of the Constitutional Court, and the law is turned into a stick of politics. The picture we see in the budget of the Ministry is this: The number of files in enforcement offices has reached 32 million 700 thousand, almost half of the country is under enforcement. "Justice delayed is justice denied."
principle has been forgotten and the hearing period for a case has increased to nine hundred and eighteen days. By introducing loyalty instead of merit to state institutions, a caste system has been built in the state. The citizens' hope to seek their rights has faded and their faith in the rule of law has been shaken. This is an unfair Turkey. Of course, we will say "no" to the unfair Türkiye's Ministry of Justice budget. (Applause from the İYİ Party benches)
In Türkiye, where "survival and security" is written on mountains and stones, the budget of the Ministry of Internal Affairs has reached a record level. According to the numbers, the Ministry is richer than the world's largest conglomerates, but if you look out the window, that is, on the street, the picture is exactly the opposite. There is an unsafe, unsafe and uncanny Türkiye. Türkiye's streets, cafes and restaurants have turned into the Wild West. Today, a citizen can go online and have a shotgun delivered to his door, just like ordering food, without being accountable to anyone or being asked about his criminal record. These rifles, produced in underground workshops and sold for pocket money, are mainly used in femicides, roadblock fights and street clashes. A fight over traffic turns into a gunfight within seconds. While we are supposedly fighting against illegal armament, an innocent citizen is shot every day by a stray bullet.
is being cut off from life. There is no will in this budget to stop uncontrolled armament.
Huge resources are allocated to the police budget, but our police are struggling with impossibilities.
International drug lords and gang leaders wanted with a red notice are caught in the luxurious residences of Istanbul. How do these barons enter the country freely, how easily do they settle, and how are they even treated as acceptable human beings? The salt stinks, dear MPs, the salt stinks.
You know how to send the latest model vehicle to Syria, but there are bugs in the food you give to the police. Suicide cases, mobbing allegations, and inhumane working hours such as 12/24 continue at full speed. You cannot ensure the peace and security of society with a police officer who is tired, unhappy and struggling to make ends meet.

While our police and gendarmerie, who work day and night at the expense of their lives, are struggling to survive below the poverty line, you have not included even a single sentence in the budget to raise their living standards.
Let me tell you what you are doing, you are hurting the conscience of the terrorists, whom they are fighting against at the cost of their lives, by declaring them doves of peace. When a patriot appears in the heart of Eskişehir and throws these facts in your face - it is debatable whether what he did is true or not - you feel uncomfortable. That voice is the truth, that voice
It is the voice of the nation's conscience and honor; That voice is the cry of the hearths where the fire of the heroes who were martyred for this country fell. Greetings from the house of the nation, from the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye, to our security forces, police, gendarmerie and soldiers, who are our honor. (Applause from the İYİ Party benches)
We say "no" in conscience, mind and morality to this budget that cannot end the violence on the streets, cannot eradicate the drug barons, cannot eliminate the gangs that have become cartels, does not accept terrorists and does not give the rights of our police and gendarmerie.
In short, if the Ministry of Justice applies the law by selecting people and does not ensure justice, what is the need for this budget? If you pay salaries to professors and research assistants at or below the poverty line, if you virtually eliminate public schools and pave the way for an exponential increase in the number of private schools, what is the need for the National Education budget? If young people cannot find a job and get married, if those who get married are afraid to have children due to poverty, if families cannot make ends meet, what is the need for the budget of the Ministry of Family? At the end of twenty-three years, 1+1 or 2+1 chicken coop houses are marketed to the nation as if they were big business, 5 thousand liras are charged for the application, and yet nearly 6 million applications are made; people
Why is there a need for the budget of the Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change when we have to keep watch to protect our streams and forests, when concrete pouring machines, not planes, catch forest fires, when it is only a matter of time before climate refugees arrive at the door, when our lands are becoming desert and our people are left landless?
What is the need for the budget of the Ministry of Agriculture if it imports lentils, chickpeas, rice and bulgur, if its own products are returned through customs gates, if it considers Israeli seeds worthy of farmers instead of improving the ancestral seeds, if it cannot make its children drink cheap milk and if it sends its breeder animals to slaughter?
If Barzani is protected by his own heavily armed men within the borders of the Republic of Turkey, if a gang has sprung up in every city, and if gangs have even started giving dealerships over the internet, what is the need for the budget of the Ministry of Internal Affairs? (Applause from the İYİ Party benches)
While the slogans of "great Türkiye, strong Türkiye" are being made from the podiums, the reality on the streets has already named the wreckage you have created: This budget proposal is the manifesto of incompetence, bad faith and incompetence. Since policy makers do not think of a compulsory social quota or empty housing tax that could be a solution to the housing crisis, we are faced with homeless people; While the loans in enforcement are breaking records, the nation's table is left empty, without bread; It is an unsafe country because there is no security for property and life.

New Türkiye
What came out underneath when we removed the packaging; It is a Turkey of deprivations, where every cell has rotted, every value has been destroyed, where inequality is legitimized and the weak are put down.
We say "no" to this government and its budget; We say "no" to the breadless Türkiye it created; We say "no" to the homeless Türkiye it created; We say "no" to the imprudent, unplanned and uncalculated Türkiye it created; We say "no" to unfair, uncanny, unsafe, lawless Türkiye; We say "no" because it creates a distrustful, hopeless, disgraceful Türkiye; We say "no" to the disreputable and compass-less Türkiye it created.
"Risks in the region." "The cards are dealt again." "Threat to survival." You keep shouting. "There are risks in the region." "The cards are being dealt again." "The imperialists are doing this, the others are planning that." You say, you keep saying. For this reason, you secretly whisper behind closed doors that you are at the bargaining table even with the PKK, and that we should even give up the republic based on national identity and unitary structure. Since survival is at stake, you desperately want us to suppress this. Well, tomorrow, "We made a mistake in this matter too; we were deceived, we were deceived." If so, will you make a U-turn? "May my nation forgive me." will you say? You've already started slowly. wheat
Will you import national identity and unitary structure as if you were importing? Will you issue other mining licenses to re-establish the Republic of Turkey? I wasn't going to go into this subject in such a comprehensive way, but Mr. Speaker of the Parliament made such a comprehensive assessment while opening the meeting, and even talked about the new report to be written, etc., and explained that the Commission was working very well. Almost half of the meetings held by the commission are already secret meetings. I hope and pray that you can come up with something that will meet your expectations, but you are the President of a Parliament that is not even able to write down the minutes of your visit. (Applause from the ranks of the İYİ Party) For this reason, it should not be kept in mind that we have to use extremely careful sentences instead of speaking as we think.
We say "no" to you and your budget because you want to give Türkiye a nightmare with the tale of a terror-free Turkey, because you have moved away from your national identity and become unconscious enough to bargain for power with terrorists, because you forget the oaths you took on your honor and dignity and covet the rights and laws of 85 million people.
I respectfully greet the General Assembly. (Standing applause from the ranks of the İYİ Party)
